/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/app.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/model.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/service.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/storage.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/ui.c.o CMakeFiles/app.dir/src/app_paths.c.o -o app  -lgtk-3 -lgdk-3 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lcairo-gobject -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -latk-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lcairo -lharfbuzz -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lz
